name: mantle-agent-scaffold
description: Monorepo for Mantle L2 tooling — core library, CLI, and MCP server

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/cli -w packages/mcp
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/core && npm run typecheck -w packages/cli -w packages/mcp
scripts.skills:sync: git submodule update --init --remote skills && git add skills
